title: atropa bella-donna f. lutea
intro: Atropa bella-donna f. lutea, commonly known as the Yellow Belladonna, is a subspecies of the deadly nightshade plant, belonging to the Solanaceae family. This plant contains medicinal properties due to its alkaloid content, particularly scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Yellow Belladonna include relief from pain, inflammation, and spasms, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote sleep. Herbal preparations of Atropa bella-donna f. lutea include tinctures, infusions, and dried extracts, although caution is advised when handling the plant due to its toxic nature.
